title: The stag hunt tips to cooperation
author: OpenDiscover
blurb: The Stag Hunt is the classic model of risky cooperation: hunt a stag together for a big reward, or play it safe alone for a sure but smaller one. It is bistable — everyone cooperating and everyone defecting are BOTH evolutionarily stable, split by an unstable threshold at 75% stag-hunters. This run starts just above that line (80%) and tips the whole population into full cooperation. Start even slightly below 75% and the same dynamics collapse it to all-safe instead. History, not just payoffs, decides the outcome (Skyrms, 2004).
